fullNetworkNetChange.label: Full Network Net Change
fullNetworkNetChange.description: Average utilization change across every edge in the network. Negative values mean less average utilization; positive values mean more.
fullNetworkNetChange.formula: sum(utilDelta_e for e in allEdges) / count(allEdges)
fullNetworkNetChange.denominator: All edges in the network (not just affected edges)

edgesAffected.label: Edges Affected
edgesAffected.description: Number of edges whose utilization changes as a result of the analyzed action.

newBottlenecks.label: New Bottlenecks
newBottlenecks.description: Edges that crossed the 85% utilization threshold as a result of this action.
newBottlenecks.formula: count(e in allEdges where utilBefore_e <= 85 and utilAfter_e > 85)

thresholdLow.label: Healthy (< 60%)
thresholdLow.description: Plenty of headroom. Adding services here is low-risk and unlikely to create congestion.

thresholdMid.label: Watch (60–85%)
thresholdMid.description: Approaching capacity. Plan for growth — sustained traffic in this band is the early signal that an upgrade is needed.

thresholdHigh.label: Bottleneck (> 85%)
thresholdHigh.description: Edge is congested. Service additions risk failure and existing services may experience contention. Consider rerouting or upgrading capacity.
